project_type: React + Vite SPA with Firebase Firestore integration
verification_instructions: Run npm install && npm run build to verify the application compiles cleanly with no errors.
environment_constraints: No test suite exists. Verification is limited to build success.
contribution_requirements: Commit changes to local branch after cleanup. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: persistenceService.js exports functions used by App.jsx. App.jsx imports specific named exports. The new architecture uses: cm-meta, cm-proj-{id}, cm-ws-{projId}-{wsId}, cm-tasks-{projId} in localStorage and projects/{projectId}, projects/{projectId}/workspaces/{workspaceId}, projects/{projectId}/tasks/taskData, userMeta/main in Firestore.
directory_structure: Single src/ directory with all components (JSX) and services (JS). No subdirectories for modules. Config at root (vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js).
